notes:
A selection fix release.

**Fixes & polish**

- **Selecting text across a tag, link, or block reference now stays
  highlighted.** A text selection that crossed a `#tag`, `[[link]]`, or `((ref))`
  used to lose its highlight entirely — it looked like the selection had
  collapsed to just that item. The full selection band now paints across the
  whole range. (Selecting *just* a chip still shows the ring with no line-wide
  highlight; shift-clicking a link still opens it in the right sidebar.)

**Under the hood**

- The atom-selection band-suppression (added in 0.3.32) keyed off
  `:has(.ProseMirror-selectednode)`, but ProseMirror marks any inline atom
  *contained in a text range* with that class — so a multi-block selection that
  merely included a tag matched and hid the whole band. It now keys off a
  `.pm-atom-selected` class set only when the selection is exactly one inline
  atom (the case that balloons in WKWebView).
